notes: Each eval drives the axon4to5-migrate Skill with the query-handler recipe in single mode. Write the `**Result:**` block (per SKILL.md Step 4d) to `$WORKSPACE/outputs/result.md`. Required format: `**Result:** âś… Success`, followed by `**Recipe:** axon4to5-query-handler` and a `**Notes:**` line summarising what was changed.
